title: Export filtered/batch selected views to excel
excerpt: Want to be able to pull specifically grouped items & export them to excel rather than having to export the whole board.

posts.author: mfuhrmann (Meghan Fuhrmann)
posts.cookedHtml: Want to be able to pull specifically grouped items & export them to excel rather than having to export the whole board.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Meghan,
If you’re open to apps, I can suggest Smart Spreadsheet for monday. It auto-imports each group on monday board separately into Excel. You can delete unnecessary groups and then export only the needed ones in Excel format.
